---
title: "Home"
---

## Overview

This is a Quarto **website** project. Unlike a single HTML document, it renders a navbar, sidebar, and footer, so it exercises the navigation variables in the HTML/Bootstrap schema (`$navbar-bg`, `$navbar-fg`, `$navbar-hl`, `$sidebar-bg`, `$sidebar-fg`, `$sidebar-hl`, `$footer-bg`, `$footer-fg`).

Tweak those from the Theme Tweaker panel to restyle the chrome around the content.

## Content

Body text with a [link](https://quarto.org) and some `inline code`, plus a code block and callouts to cover the rest of the schema.

```r
fit <- lm(dist ~ speed, data = cars)
summary(fit)
```

::: {.callout-note}
A note callout, accented by `$callout-color-note`.
:::
